dialogue.speaker: Oliver
dialogue.text: Hej William. Hvad vil du gerne have at spise i dag?

dialogue.speaker: William
dialogue.text: Jeg vil gerne have en stor burger med pommes frites. Hvad med dig?

dialogue.speaker: Oliver
dialogue.text: Jeg tager en pizza med ost og skinke. Jeg er meget sulten.

dialogue.speaker: William
dialogue.text: Det lyder godt! Hvad vil du have at drikke?

dialogue.speaker: Oliver
dialogue.text: Bare et koldt glas vand, tak. Hvad drikker du?

dialogue.speaker: William
dialogue.text: Jeg bestiller en stor cola. Nu kalder jeg på tjeneren.

translation.speaker: Oliver
translation.text: Hi William. What would you like to eat today?

translation.speaker: William
translation.text: I would like a big burger with french fries. What about you?

translation.speaker: Oliver
translation.text: I will take a pizza with cheese and ham. I am very hungry.

translation.speaker: William
translation.text: That sounds good! What do you want to drink?

translation.speaker: Oliver
translation.text: Just a cold glass of water, please. What are you drinking?

translation.speaker: William
translation.text: I am ordering a big cola. Now I will call the waiter.

vocabulary.example: Jeg vil gerne have en stor burger med pommes frites.
Hvad vil du gerne have at spise i dag?
Hvad vil du have at drikke?
Bare et koldt glas vand, tak.
